benefits.description: Lost 12.3% of body weight in 6 weeks despite not subjectively feeling appetite suppression

protocol_notes: Started at 0.5mg in week 1, titrated up to 4mg over 6 weeks. Planning to increase to 5mg next dose. Ordered from 2 different vendors to rule out bunk product. No prior GLP medication use. Practices fasting and disciplined caloric deficit. Reports no perceived food noise reduction or appetite suppression despite weight loss results.
